channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 17th June
item.description:
Yet again fly tipping in the area.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dandridge Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over hanging shrubs, 17th June
item.description:
Over hanging plants you gave to go into the road to pass some one
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping on Dunstans Road, 17th June
item.description:
Someone left a washing machine in the usual spot by St David’s Mansion. Fly tipping is now a daily occurrence in Dunstans Road and I can’t see Southwark Council making any effort to prevent this from happening. I would welcome a phone call to discuss the situation . Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dawson's Hill Footpath (Dunstan's Road to Ladlands), East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cat or dog food continuously dumped on street, 17th June
item.description:
There is regularly piles of car of dog food (pellets) left on the street on the corner of Elmwood and Danecroft (west side). This not only causes problems for residents walking their dog, keeping them away from the dumped food, but also attracts rats and other vermin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danecroft Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Canvas like thing on pavement, 17th June
item.description:
Canvas like structure dumped on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlyn Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches and twigs, 17th June
item.description:
Previously reported on here Twigs from roof of flats where pigeons are nesting looks very messy Received feedback that it had been removed but it’s all still there

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nichol Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip of furniture outside house, 17th June
item.description:
The residents of the house on the corner of Heavitree and Burwash have again left furniture and other unwanted bits on the pavement. It’s a HMO so various residents do it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heavitree Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nasty bush growing yet again, 17th June
item.description:
I have reported this dangerous bush in previous years and it is still growing back. It needs digging out. The huge, nasty thorns are the height a baby’s face and hands would be if passing in a pram and they could cause damage. This needs to be removed asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation obscuring road sign, 17th June
item.description:
The road signs for Southover at the junction with Burnt Ash Lane are obscured by vegetation and not visible from Burnt Ash Lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southover, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continue with tree pruning, 17th June
item.description:
Contractor started pruning trees in Park Hill, then left notices on a number of trees saying they would be back 9 and 10 June. They have not come back; nothing has been done and trees still not pruned. When are workers coming back to finish the jobs they started? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Hill, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bucket and bin, 17th June
item.description:
Bucket and bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hargwyne Street, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded tree branches, 17th June
item.description:
By tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Teignmouth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Lots of lime bikes all over the pavement., 17th June
item.description:
Over a hundred bikes parked here. this can't be right

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ickburgh Road, Clapton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 17th June
item.description:
Graffiti on green cabinet. Please note there are 2 green Abomey’s with same tag on it’s not duplicate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dawson's Hill Footpath (Dunstan's Road to Ladlands), East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 17th June
item.description:
This fox is now stinking and decomposing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green cabinet, 17th June
item.description:
Graffiti on green cabinet. Please note there are 2 green Abomey’s with same tag on it’s not duplicate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dawson's Hill Footpath (Dunstan's Road to Ladlands), East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling reported previously still on pavement needs water cleaning, 17th June
item.description:
I have previously reported dog mess on the public highway I received a notification that it had been removed but it’s still present

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nichol Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree, 17th June
item.description:
The tree has died and need removing and replacing. Branches could fall don’t is a hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Drayton Gardens, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass, 17th June
item.description:
There is a huge patch of broken glass in the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 96, Vassall Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Couple erecting tent in children’s play area park, 17th June
item.description:
Couple putting up tent in children’s pant area- very loud, likely drunk

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bennett Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
